notes:
Linux / Steam Deck
I can only access Ubisoft Connect after logging in, then I get a message saying that the service is unavailable. This problem is both with the Steam Deck and on the Linux system on the PC. Until a few weeks ago everything worked fine, I was able to play Division 1 and Anno 1800 etc.

Windows
If I try the same login data in a Windows environment, everything goes through and I can start everything.

Is there something like a shadow ban at Ubi, that one system is allowed and another is not. Why does it only seem to affect me.
